message:
test(membrane): add property-based tests for check_oracle and fingerprint modules

Add proptest blocks to check_oracle (6 properties: pack/unpack
roundtrip, valid permutations, monotonic call counter, early-exit
rate bounded to [0,1], stage from_u8 roundtrip, cost positivity) and
fingerprint (5 properties: fingerprint roundtrip, verify correct/wrong
address, canary roundtrip, canary detects byte flip, distinct inputs
produce distinct hashes).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
